issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer opens, the function adds CSS classes and emits events but never sets the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute to "true". Screen readers cannot announce the expanded state to users.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1159: Insert `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after the line `_open = true;`

issuesFound.title: productFilter.applyFilters missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the visible product cards update and the count badge changes, but no aria-live announcement informs screen reader users how many products match the selected criteria or that the filter has been applied.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1938: After the line `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`, insert `liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} product${totalMatches !== 1 ? 's' : ''} shown`);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The function reveals the dropdown panel by removing the hidden attribute and adding CSS classes, but it never sets the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute to "true". Assistive technologies cannot convey the open state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1292: Insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after the line `inst.open = true;`

issuesFound.title: activeFilterChips.render missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When active filter chips are added or removed, the visual list updates dynamically, but screen reader users receive no notification of which filters are currently active or that the filter list has changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2035: After the line `chips.forEach(c => _containerEl.appendChild(_makeChip(c.label, c.key, c.value)));`, insert `if (chips.length) liveRegion.announce(`Active filters: ${chips.map(c => c.label).join(', ')}`);`

issuesFound.title: productFilter._syncTabAriaStates missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons act as toggle buttons but the function only updates CSS classes when the active category changes. It fails to update the aria-pressed attribute to reflect the pressed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1954: Inside the forEach callback, insert `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));` immediately after the line `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When a FAQ answer panel expands, the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is not programmatically set to "true". This prevents screen readers from announcing the expanded state to users.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2452: Insert `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after the line `item.open = true;`

issuesFound.title: searchResultsHighlighter.highlight missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When search terms are highlighted in results, the DOM is modified to wrap matches in `<mark>` elements, but screen reader users are not informed that highlighting has occurred or how many matches were found.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2225: After the line `_highlightTokensInElement(container, tokens);`, insert `liveRegion.announce(`Search terms highlighted`);` or announce the count of matches found.

issuesFound.title: contactForm.validateAll (via inlineValidator) never sets aria-invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The `inlineValidator.validate()` routine adds an error message element but only calls `srUtils.markInvalid()`, which adds `aria-describedby` without setting `aria-invalid="true"`. Consequently, form validation errors are not exposed to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: In `inlineValidator._renderResult()`, when `!result.valid` also call `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');`. Likewise, clear the attribute on valid fields.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.toggle leaves aria-expanded out of sync when closing
issuesFound.explanation: `mobileNav.close()` correctly sets `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger, but because `mobileNav.open()` never set it to “true”, the attribute can become permanently “false” after a single open/close cycle, breaking state reporting.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure `mobileNav.open()` (see Issue 1) sets `aria-expanded="true"` so the toggle stays in sync.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch._updateStatus updates a status element but does not announce the change to a live region
issuesFound.explanation: `_updateStatus()` writes result‑count text into `_statusEl` but the element lacks `aria-live="polite"` (or the text is not announced). Screen‑reader users receive no feedback about the number of suggestions returned.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure `_statusEl` has `role="status"` and `aria-live="polite"` (add in `mount()` of `suggestionListRenderer`) or call `liveRegion.announce(_statusEl.textContent);` after setting the text.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance does not set aria-expanded="true" on its trigger button
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown is opened, `_openInstance()` removes the `hidden` attribute from the panel and adds CSS classes, but never updates the trigger’s `aria-expanded` to “true”. Screen readers still think the menu is collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` inside `_openInstance()` after opening the panel.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close actions do not provide a screen‑reader announcement of the menu state
issuesFound.explanation: While the menu’s visual state changes, no `liveRegion.announce()` call is made, so users are not informed that the menu has opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix: After setting `aria-expanded`, also call `liveRegion.announce(inst.open ? 'Menu opened' : 'Menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open does not set aria-expanded="true" on the question button
issuesFound.explanation: The `open(item)` function expands the answer panel and animates height, but never updates the trigger button’s `aria-expanded` attribute to “true”. Users of assistive technology cannot tell which FAQ item is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` at the start of `open(item)`.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch suggestion list updates (render) do not announce the number of results to assistive technology
issuesFound.explanation: After fetching suggestions, the UI updates the list but no live‑region message is emitted, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of how many suggestions are available.
issuesFound.fix: After `suggestionListRenderer.render(results, norm);` add `liveRegion.announce(`${results.length} suggestion${results.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} found`);`.

issuesFound.title: fileUploadField validation error not reflected in aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When file validation fails, an error is announced but aria-invalid="true" is not set on the file input. The input does not programmatically reflect the error state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: fileUploadField._addFile
  if (!validation.valid) { setAttr(binding.inputEl, 'aria-invalid', 'true'); liveRegion.announceAssertive(`${file.name}: ${validation.error}`); return; }

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The open function sets the drawer to visible but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen reader users will not know the menu is open when activating the trigger.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: mobileNav.open
  setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu state changes not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus does not trigger a live region announcement. Users relying on screen readers are not informed when the menu state changes.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: dropdownMenu._openInstance
  liveRegion.announce('Menu expanded');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The function removes the hidden attribute from the panel but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen reader users will not receive the state change.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: dropdownMenu._openInstance
  setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');

issuesFound.title: testimonialsCarousel play/pause state not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Toggling auto-play updates the button label and aria-pressed but does not announce the state change via a live region. Users may not realize auto-play has started or stopped.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: testimonialsCarousel.play
  liveRegion.announce('Automatic slide rotation started');

issuesFound.title: productFilter filter tabs missing aria-pressed state
issuesFound.explanation: Filter tab buttons toggle active state but only receive a CSS class. They lack aria-pressed to indicate which filter is currently active to screen reader users.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: productFilter._syncTabAriaStates
  setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The function expands the answer panel but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the question trigger button. The state change is not communicated to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: faqAccordion.open
  setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');

issuesFound.title: statCounterAnimator number updates not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Animated counters update their text content and aria-label on completion but do not announce the change via a live region. Screen reader users miss the updated statistic.
issuesFound.fix:
Line: statCounterAnimator._animate (onComplete callback)
  liveRegion.announce(`Statistic updated to ${_format(cfg.target, cfg)}`);

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close missing focus return
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, the function deactivates the focus trap (if active) but fails to return keyboard focus to the hamburger trigger button. Keyboard users lose their place in the page focus order.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1198: Insert `if (_trigger) _trigger.focus();` immediately before the closing brace of the function or after `emit(_trigger, 'mobilenav:close', { drawer: _drawer });`

issuesFound.title: scrollSpy._activate missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: As users scroll through page sections, the active navigation link updates visually and aria-current is set, but the change is not announced to screen readers, so users do not know which section is currently active.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1645: After the line `addClass(link, cfg.activeClass);`, insert `liveRegion.announce(`Now viewing ${section.id || 'section'}`);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeAll loses focus on outside click
issuesFound.explanation: When a user clicks outside the dropdown menu to close it, the _closeAll function calls _closeInstance(inst) without passing true for the returnFocus parameter. This causes focus to be lost to the document body instead of returning to the trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1272: Change `_closeInstance(inst);` to `_closeInstance(inst, true);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav focus trap incomplete
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav module declares a `_trap` variable to hold a focus trap instance but never initializes it using createFocusTrap() or activates it when the menu opens. Keyboard focus can escape the drawer and move to background elements.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance does not remove aria-controls when closing (optional)
issuesFound.explanation: The close routine removes CSS classes and hides the panel but does not clear `aria-controls` on the trigger, which can leave stale references if the menu is dynamically removed.
issuesFound.fix: After hiding the panel, call `removeAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-controls');` (or set it to the panel’s id only when the menu is present).

issuesFound.title: newsletterForm.validate (via inlineValidator) suffers the same missing aria-invalid issue
issuesFound.explanation: The newsletter subscription field is validated with `inlineValidator`, which does not set `aria-invalid`. Users cannot detect the error state.
issuesFound.fix: Apply the same fix as Issue 7 to the newsletter form’s email input (add `aria-invalid="true"` on validation failure).

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.toggle (via click) does not announce the navigation state change
issuesFound.explanation: The click handler toggles the drawer but only the `open()` path announces; the `close()` path does not. Users may not know the menu closed.
issuesFound.fix: In `close()` add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosedAnnouncement || 'Navigation menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion close action does not announce that the answer collapsed
issuesFound.explanation: When an FAQ item is collapsed, no live‑region announcement is made, so screen‑reader users receive no feedback.
issuesFound.fix: After hiding the panel, call `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} — collapsed`);`.

Line: cookieConsent._showBanner
  liveRegion.announce('Cookie consent banner displayed. Please review your preferences.');

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When form validation marks a field as invalid, it updates aria-describedby to link the error message, but it never sets aria-invalid="true" on the field itself, which is required to communicate the invalid state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1425 (inside markInvalid function): `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open/close functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer toggle functions add and remove CSS classes to show or hide the drawer, but they never update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to communicate the expanded or collapsed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1624 (inside open function, after _open = true): `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');`
  Line 1647 (inside close function, after _open = false): `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown menu opens or closes, no announcement is made to screen readers via the liveRegion utility, leaving users unaware that content has appeared or disappeared.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1736 (inside _openInstance, after opening): `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');`
  Line 1751 (inside _closeInstance, after closing): `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav init does not set initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation module initialises, it does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button to indicate that the drawer is initially closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1680 (inside init function, after _initialised = true): `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing FAQ panels is not announced to screen readers, so users may not realize that content has been revealed or hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2892 (inside open function): `liveRegion.announce(item.question + ' expanded');`
  Line 2915 (inside close function): `liveRegion.announce(item.question + ' collapsed');`

issuesFound.title: productFilter filter tabs missing aria-selected
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons indicate the active state visually via CSS classes, but they do not expose the selected state to screen readers using aria-selected or aria-pressed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2356 (inside _syncTabAriaStates forEach loop): `setAttr(btn, ARIA.SELECTED, String(isActive));` or `setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: pricing setPeriod does not announce billing change via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When users switch between monthly and annual billing, the prices update visually, but the change in billing period is not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2532 (inside setPeriod function, after emit): `liveRegion.announce(`Prices switched to ${period} billing`);`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu instance functions manage the panel's hidden state and CSS classes, but they never toggle the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to reflect whether the dropdown is open or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1736 (inside _openInstance, after inst.open = true): `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');`
  Line 1751 (inside _closeInstance, after inst.open = false): `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on error
issuesFound.explanation: `inlineValidator._renderResult()` adds error text and CSS classes but never sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the invalid field, nor removes it on success. This breaks the required ARIA mapping for form errors.
issuesFound.fix: In `_renderResult()`, when `result.valid` is false, add `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');`; when valid, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation close does not reset aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.close()` function hides the navigation drawer but never updates the trigger button’s `aria-expanded` attribute to “false”. Screen‑reader users are not informed that the menu is collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` inside `mobileNav.close()` after the drawer is hidden.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu actions are not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing a dropdown updates visual state but never announces the change (e.g., “Menu opened”) to a live region, violating WCAG 2.2 guidance for dynamic UI.
issuesFound.fix: After setting `aria-expanded` in both `_openInstance()` and `_closeInstance()`, call `liveRegion.announce(inst.open ? 'Menu opened' : 'Menu closed');`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger button (`_trigger`) is never given an initial `aria-expanded="false"` value on page load, leaving its state undefined for assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: In `mobileNav.init()`, after locating `_trigger`, add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open/close not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing an FAQ item changes visible content without announcing the state change, leaving screen‑reader users unaware.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqOpened || 'Answer expanded');` and after closing, `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed || 'Answer collapsed');`.

issuesFound.title: Theme‑switcher buttons lack proper aria‑pressed handling on init
issuesFound.explanation: The theme toggle buttons (`[data-theme-toggle]`) are not given an initial `aria-pressed` state matching the stored theme, causing screen readers to miss the current selection.
issuesFound.fix: In `themeSwitcher.init()`, after reading the stored theme, iterate over the buttons and set `setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, btn.getAttribute('data-theme-toggle') === storedTheme ? 'true' : 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open does not set aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: `_openInstance()` removes the hidden attribute from the panel and adds an open class, but never sets `aria-expanded="true"` on the associated trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Inside `_openInstance()`, after `inst.open = true;`, add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open does not set aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: `faqAccordion.open(item)` expands the answer panel but never updates the trigger button’s `aria-expanded` to “true”. Assistive tech still thinks the item is collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: In `faqAccordion.open()`, after marking the item open, add `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation drawer hidden without aria‑hidden
issuesFound.explanation: When the drawer is closed, the element is only hidden via CSS classes (`removeClass(_drawer, …)`) and scroll‑lock. No `aria-hidden="true"` is applied, so the drawer remains in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: In `mobileNav.close()`, after removing the open class, call `setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true');` (or `_drawer.setAttribute('hidden','')`).

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator fields missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The inlineValidator._renderResult() function and srUtils.markInvalid() helper link error messages via aria-describedby but fail to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. This prevents assistive technologies from identifying the field as having an error state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3775: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');
  Line 3975: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-expanded state
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav module's open() and close() functions toggle the visibility of the navigation drawer but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button (_trigger). Screen reader users will not know if the menu is currently open or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1675: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 1695: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav close action not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.close() function hides the drawer but does not announce the state change via the liveRegion module. The open() function announces 'Navigation menu opened', but closing it is silent, leaving screen reader users unsure if the action succeeded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1695: liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu triggers missing aria-expanded state
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu module's _openInstance() and _closeInstance() functions manage the panel visibility but fail to set aria-expanded on the trigger element (inst.trigger). This violates WCAG 4.1.2 as the state is not programmatically determinable.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1845: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 1855: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu state changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus does not trigger any announcement to the live region. Users relying on screen readers are not informed when a submenu appears or disappears.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1845: liveRegion.announce('Submenu opened');
  Line 1855: liveRegion.announce('Submenu closed');

issuesFound.title: productFilter tabs missing aria-pressed attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The _syncTabAriaStates() function in productFilter toggles the CSS 'is-active' class on filter buttons but does not update the aria-pressed attribute. These buttons act as toggle controls, and their state must be conveyed via ARIA.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2625: setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, String(isActive));

issuesFound.title: pricing period change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The setPeriod() function updates prices across all plan cards when the billing period changes but does not announce this significant content update to the live region. Users may not realize prices have switched from monthly to annual or vice versa.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3345: liveRegion.announce(`Prices switched to ${period} billing`);

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open() function sets the panel to visible but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. The close() function correctly sets it to false, creating an inconsistent state where the open state is not reflected in ARIA.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2925: setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion state changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing FAQ items does not announce the change to screen readers. While the visual state changes, AT users are not informed that an answer has been revealed or hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2925: liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} — answer expanded`);
  Line 2955: liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} — answer collapsed`);

issuesFound.title: viewportReveal elements missing aria-hidden before reveal
issuesFound.explanation: The viewportReveal module adds the 'is-revealed' class when elements enter the viewport but does not set aria-hidden="true" on them initially. This can cause screen readers to read content that is visually hidden before animation.
issuesFound.fix: Line 4725: el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger trigger button controls the mobile navigation drawer element, but the code never sets an aria-controls attribute on the trigger to programmatically associate it with the drawer region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1680 (inside init function, after _initialised = true): `const drawerId = srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'mobile-nav-drawer'); setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.CONTROLS, drawerId);`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The FAQ accordion open and close functions manage the panel visibility and CSS classes, but they fail to update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to indicate the current state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2892 (inside open function, after item.open = true): `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');`
  Line 2915 (inside close function, after item.open = false): `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When a field is marked as valid, the function removes the error description association but does not set aria-invalid="false" or remove the aria-invalid attribute to indicate the field is no longer invalid.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu close does not reset aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: `_closeInstance()` hides the panel but does not set `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger, leaving its state stale for screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Inside `_closeInstance()`, after hiding the panel, add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ triggers missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: When the page loads, FAQ question buttons lack an explicit `aria-expanded="false"` attribute, so their collapsed state is not conveyed to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: In `faqRegistry.parse()`, after creating the trigger, add `setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` if the item is not initially open.

issuesFound.title: Product filter updates UI without live‑region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: `productFilter.applyFilters()` changes the visible product count and empty‑state but does not announce the result (e.g., “12 products shown”) to a live region, violating dynamic‑content guidance.
issuesFound.fix: After updating the count badge, call `liveRegion.announce(`${count} products shown`);` (or a localized equivalent).

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not clear aria‑invalid on success
issuesFound.explanation: When a field becomes valid, the validator removes error text but does not clear `aria-invalid`, leaving the field incorrectly marked as invalid.

issuesFound.title: productFilter changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The applyFilters() function updates the product grid and count badge but does not announce the result count or filter application to the live region. Screen reader users are not informed that the content has changed.

issuesFound.explanation: The suggestionListRenderer.mount() function sets up the combobox but does not initialize aria-expanded="false" on the input element. It is only set when the list opens or closes, leaving the initial state undefined.

issuesFound.title: testimonialsCarousel play/pause button aria-pressed not synced on init
issuesFound.explanation: The testimonialsCarousel init() function starts auto-play but does not ensure the _playBtn has the correct initial aria-pressed state before the first toggle. If the carousel starts playing, the button should reflect aria-pressed="true" immediately.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3185: setAttr(_playBtn, ARIA.PRESSED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: cookieConsent banner missing focus trap release announcement

issuesFound.title: themeSwitcher toggle button missing aria-pressed on init
issuesFound.explanation: The themeSwitcher init() function sets the theme but does not update the aria-pressed state of the toggle buttons ([data-theme-toggle]) until a click occurs. The initial state is not reflected in ARIA.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: When form validation fails, the markInvalid function updates aria-describedby to link the error message but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Assistive technologies cannot programmatically determine that the field contains an invalid value, violating WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` immediately after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);` in the markInvalid function.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is not initialised with aria-expanded="false" on page load. Screen readers will not announce the collapsed state of the navigation drawer when the page loads, violating WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `_initialised = true;` in the init function.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing focus trap activation
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer declares a focus trap variable (`_trap`) but never instantiates or activates it when the drawer opens. This allows keyboard focus to escape the drawer and move to background content while the drawer is visually open, violating WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible and 2.4.3 Focus Order.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: false }); _trap.activate();` immediately after opening the drawer in the open function (before the emit call).

issuesFound.title: mobileNav close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, there is no announcement to screen readers. Users navigating with assistive technology will not be notified that the menu has closed, unlike when it opens which is announced.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `if (announceToSR !== false) { liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed'); }` before the `emit` call in the close function.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open/close missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The open and close functions toggle the navigation drawer visibility but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to reflect the state change. This prevents assistive technologies from announcing whether the menu is expanded or collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Line: In mobileNav.open, add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` after `addClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`. In mobileNav.close, add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus updates the visual state and emits custom events, but does not announce these state changes to screen readers via the live region system. Users may not be aware that a menu has opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line: In _openInstance, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownOpened || 'Menu opened');` before the emit call. In _closeInstance, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownClosed || 'Menu closed');` before the emit call.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The search combobox input is initialized without aria-expanded="false", despite being in a collapsed state by default. Screen readers cannot convey to users that the suggestions list is currently collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(input, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` in the mount function after setting aria-haspopup.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close missing live region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding and collapsing FAQ items updates the aria-expanded attribute but does not announce the state change or the content of the revealed answer to screen readers. Users may not realize that new content has appeared or disappeared.
issuesFound.fix: Line: In the open function, add `liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.faqOpened || '{title} expanded').replace('{title}', item.question));` after setting the expanded state. In the close function, add `liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.faqClosed || '{title} collapsed').replace('{title}', item.question));`.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator missing aria-invalid clear on valid
issuesFound.explanation: When a field transitions from invalid to valid, the markValid function removes the error description but does not explicitly set aria-invalid="false" or remove the attribute. This leaves stale invalid state information in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: Line: Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');` or `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');` in the markValid function after clearing the describedby references.

issuesFound.title: Form validation does not clear aria‑invalid on successful submission
issuesFound.explanation: The contact form validation marks fields invalid via `inlineValidator`, which sets `aria-invalid="true"`. On successful submission the form is cleared, but the `aria-invalid` attributes are not removed, leaving stale error states.
issuesFound.fix: After successful submit, call `inlineValidator.clearAll()` or manually remove `aria-invalid` from all fields.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown trigger button does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function `_openInstance` in the dropdown menu controller adds/removes CSS classes to show or hide the dropdown panel, but it never updates the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button. This leaves screen‑reader users unaware of the menu’s state.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` when opening and `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` when closing.

issuesFound.title: Modal dialog focus trap does not return focus on close
issuesFound.explanation: The `createFocusTrap` implementation restores focus to the saved element on `deactivate`, but the modal close button does not call `deactivate`, causing focus to remain on the close button after the dialog is hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure any modal close handler invokes `focusTrap.deactivate()` before hiding the dialog.

issuesFound.title: Product filter count badge not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The function `_updateCountBadge` updates the numeric text of the product count badge, but no ARIA live region is used to announce the new total to screen‑reader users, leaving them unaware of filter results.
issuesFound.fix:
Add a hidden live region (e.g., `
`) and update its text each time the count changes.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown trigger button missing aria‑expanded on close
issuesFound.explanation: The function `_closeInstance` hides the dropdown panel but does not set `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger button, so the ARIA state remains stale.
issuesFound.fix: Call `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` before hiding the panel.

issuesFound.title: Active filter chips updates not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When filter chips are added or removed, the UI changes without any ARIA live announcement, so users of assistive technology cannot perceive the current active filters.
issuesFound.fix: After rendering chips, set the text of an existing live region (e.g., `#filter-status`) to a summary like “Filters applied: Free, Large, Price under £50”.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle missing role when not a native button
issuesFound.explanation: If the toggle element is not a `<button>`, it receives a `tabindex` and `role="switch"` but does not receive `aria-pressed`, which is required for a switch role.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure the element has `aria-pressed` (as above) and keep `role="switch"`.

issuesFound.fix: After creating the trigger, set `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` (or true if the item is initially open).

  Line 1550: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: productFilter results update not announced via aria-live region
issuesFound.explanation: The productFilter.applyFilters function updates the product count and visibility but does not announce the change to a live region. Screen reader users are not informed when filters are applied.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1935: liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} products found`);

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator does not clear aria-invalid on valid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The inlineValidator._renderResult function calls srUtils.markValid for valid states but does not remove or set aria-invalid="false". Invalid state may persist in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2560: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'false');

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle does not use aria‑pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing‑period toggle button (`_toggleEl`) acts as a binary switch (monthly ↔ annual) but only uses `aria-checked`. For a button element, the appropriate ARIA state is `aria-pressed`.
issuesFound.fix: Replace `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-checked', ...)` with `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', ...)` and ensure the attribute reflects the current state.

issuesFound.title: File upload field does not set aria‑hidden on hidden entries
issuesFound.explanation: When a file entry is removed from the list, the corresponding `<li>` element is simply removed from the DOM. If the UI instead hides the element (e.g., via a CSS class) without also setting `aria-hidden="true"`, AT may still perceive it.
issuesFound.fix: When hiding an entry (instead of removing), add `setAttr(entry.rowEl, 'aria-hidden', 'true')`.

issuesFound.title: Missing `aria-controls` on mobile navigation toggle
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger (`_trigger`) toggles the drawer but never receives an `aria-controls` attribute pointing to the drawer’s ID, making the relationship invisible to AT.
issuesFound.fix: After locating the drawer element, assign `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id)` (generate an ID if missing).

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open function does not set aria-expanded to true
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open function sets the panel to visible but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. The close function correctly sets it to false, creating an inconsistent state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2155: setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid missing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When a form field is marked as invalid, the function adds the error message to aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field itself. Screen readers rely on aria-invalid to convey the invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in markInvalid: add `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');` after the addDescribedBy call.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu controller opens and closes panels via _openInstance and _closeInstance, but neither function updates the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to reflect the panel's visibility state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in _openInstance: add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` Line in _closeInstance: add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid cleanup
issuesFound.explanation: When a form field is marked as valid, the function removes the error description but fails to clear the aria-invalid attribute (set to "false" or remove it), potentially leaving the field incorrectly announced as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Line in markValid: add `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'false');` or `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid');` after removing the describedby reference.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion toggle missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The FAQ accordion opens and closes answer panels, but the open() and close() functions do not toggle the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button to indicate the expanded/collapsed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line in open(): add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` Line in close(): add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: pricing module missing live region announcement for price changes
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period is toggled between monthly and annual, prices update visually, but the price change is not announced to screen reader users via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line in setPeriod after plan cards update: add `liveRegion.announce(\`Prices switched to \${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label} billing\`);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is not initialized with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads and the menu is closed, violating the requirement that toggle buttons reflect their initial state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in init (after _initialised = true): add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Although the functions accept an announceToSR parameter, they do not use it to trigger a live region announcement when FAQ items are expanded or collapsed, leaving screen reader users unaware of the state change.
issuesFound.fix: Line in open(): add `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(\`\${item.question} expanded\`);` Line in close(): add `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(\`\${item.question} collapsed\`);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button lacks an aria-controls attribute linking it to the drawer element it controls, preventing assistive technologies from identifying the controlled region.
issuesFound.fix: Line in init (after _drawer assignment): add `if (_drawer.id) setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.CONTROLS, _drawer.id);` or ensure the drawer has an ID and set the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors not reflected in aria‑invalid (newsletterForm, contactForm, etc.)
issuesFound.explanation: The `inlineValidator` marks fields as invalid by adding CSS classes (`fieldInvalid`) but never sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the input, nor clears it on valid input. Assistive technologies therefore do not announce validation errors.
issuesFound.fix: In `_renderResult()` add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true')` when `!result.valid` and `removeAttribute('aria-invalid')` when valid.

issuesFound.title: Toggle function does not update aria‑expanded on trigger (mobile navigation)
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.open()` and `mobileNav.close()` functions change the visibility of the mobile navigation drawer but never set or update `aria-expanded` on the hamburger button (`_trigger`). Screen‑reader users cannot know whether the menu is open.
issuesFound.fix: In `open()` set `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `close()` set `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Dynamic content updates not announced via live region (productFilter)
issuesFound.explanation: `productFilter.applyFilters()` updates the product count badge and empty‑state message, but does not write to any `aria-live` region. Users of assistive technology are unaware of the filtered results.
issuesFound.fix: After updating the count, set the text of a hidden live‑region element (e.g., `#filter-status`) with a message like “12 products shown”. Ensure the element has `aria-live="polite"`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown trigger missing aria-controls (dropdownMenu)
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown trigger button is given `aria-haspopup="true"` but no `aria-controls` linking it to the associated panel. This breaks the relationship between control and region.
issuesFound.fix: In `register()` after obtaining `panelId`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId)` if not already present.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion items do not update aria‑expanded (faqAccordion)
issuesFound.explanation: The `open(item)` and `close(item)` functions animate the answer panel but never set `aria-expanded` on the question button (`item.trigger`). Screen‑reader users cannot perceive which FAQ is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: In `open()` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `close()` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: aria‑expanded not initialised on page load (mobileNav, dropdownMenu, faqAccordion)
issuesFound.explanation: When the page loads the controls start in a collapsed state, but no script sets `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger elements. This violates WCAG 2.2 because the accessible state is undefined until interaction.
issuesFound.fix: During module initialization, after locating each trigger, set `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Toggle trigger missing aria‑controls (mobile navigation)
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile‑nav trigger button (`_trigger`) does not have an `aria-controls` attribute that references the drawer element (`_drawer`). Assistive technologies cannot associate the control with the region it toggles.
issuesFound.fix: After locating `_drawer`, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'nav-drawer'))`.

issuesFound.title: Form validation error not reflected in aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The srUtils.markInvalid function adds an aria-describedby reference but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Screen readers will not announce the field as invalid, violating WCAG 3.3.1.

issuesFound.title: Toggle function does not update aria-expanded on trigger element
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.open function adds the open class but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen readers will not know the menu is open.

issuesFound.title: Dynamic content update not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The productFilter.applyFilters function updates the product count badge but does not announce the change to screen readers via a live region.

issuesFound.title: aria-expanded not initialised on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.init function does not set the initial aria-expanded="false" state on the trigger button. The initial state is ambiguous to assistive technology.

issuesFound.title: User action result not announced via aria-live region
issuesFound.explanation: The cookieConsent._onAccept function grants consent and hides the banner but does not announce the acceptance status to screen readers.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav focus trap not activated on open
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer opens but the focus trap is never activated, allowing keyboard focus to escape to the background content behind the modal drawer.
issuesFound.fix: Line in open(): add `if (_trap) _trap.activate();`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav focus not returned to trigger on close
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, focus is not returned to the trigger button that opened it, potentially leaving keyboard users at the bottom of the page or in an unknown location.
issuesFound.fix: Line in close(): add `_trigger.focus();` at the end of the function.

issuesFound.title: productFilter filter tabs missing aria-pressed update
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons act as toggle buttons (showing active state) but the function only toggles CSS classes and does not update aria-pressed to indicate the pressed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line in _syncTabAriaStates forEach loop: add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: productFilter filter tabs missing aria-pressed initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons are not initialized with aria-pressed attributes to reflect their initial state when the page loads.
issuesFound.fix: Line in _syncTabAriaStates function: ensure the aria-pressed attribute is set for all buttons, not just the active one, or add initialization loop in init setting aria-pressed="false" on inactive tabs and "true" on active.

issuesFound.title: Missing aria‑controls on pricing period toggle button (pricing)
issuesFound.explanation: The billing‑period toggle (`_toggleEl`) controls the visibility of the annual/quarterly pricing panels but does not have an `aria-controls` attribute referencing those panels. Assistive technologies cannot associate the switch with the content it changes.
issuesFound.fix: After locating the panels, add `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(panelEl, 'pricing-panel'))` for each controlled region.

issuesFound.title: aria-invalid not cleared on valid input
issuesFound.explanation: The srUtils.markValid function removes the aria-describedby reference but fails to remove or set aria-invalid="false" on the field. The invalid state may persist in the accessibility tree.

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors not reflected in aria-invalid (markInvalid)
issuesFound.explanation: When a field fails validation, the markInvalid helper adds aria-describedby pointing to the error message, but never sets aria-invalid="true" on the input. Screen readers will not announce the field as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true'); inside the markInvalid function before or after the addDescribedBy call.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open function omits aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When a user activates a FAQ question button to expand the answer, the open() function adds CSS classes and removes the hidden attribute from the panel, but never sets aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen readers will not announce the expanded state, leaving blind users unaware that content is now visible.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); immediately after item.open = true; in the open function.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open action not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile menu opens, no live-region announcement is made. Although focus management is also missing, the state change itself (Navigation menu opened) should be announced to screen reader users via the liveRegion utility.
issuesFound.fix: Add liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened'); at the end of the open function.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion close function omits aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When closing an accordion panel, the code removes CSS classes and eventually sets the hidden attribute, but fails to set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button. This leaves screen readers believing the panel is still expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); immediately after item.open = false; in the close function.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation close action not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile menu closes, no announcement is made to screen readers. Users who dismiss the menu via the Escape key or close button need confirmation that the menu is closed and focus will return to the trigger.
issuesFound.fix: Add liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed'); before the function exits.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period buttons (Monthly/Annual) act as a toggle group indicating the active billing cycle, but the code only toggles CSS classes and never sets aria-pressed="true" on the active button or aria-pressed="false" on inactive buttons. Screen readers cannot convey which option is selected.
issuesFound.fix: Inside the _periodBtns.forEach loop, add setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive)); after toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);

issuesFound.title: Pricing period change not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period toggles between monthly and annual, prices update visually and via text content, but no aria-live announcement informs screen reader users of the price change or the new billing period.
issuesFound.fix: Add liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly); after updating the plan cards.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open function missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function reveals the dropdown panel by removing the hidden attribute and adding CSS classes, but does not update the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute to "true". Assistive technology users cannot perceive that the menu is now open.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); immediately after inst.open = true; in the _openInstance function.

issuesFound.title: Site search input missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox trigger for the suggestion listbox, which starts hidden. The input receives role="combobox" and aria-controls, but never receives aria-expanded="false" to indicate the listbox is initially collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: After setAttr(input, 'aria-haspopup', 'listbox'); add setAttr(input, 'aria-expanded', 'false');

issuesFound.title: Form validation valid state not clearing aria-invalid (markValid)
issuesFound.explanation: When a field becomes valid, the markValid helper removes the error message from aria-describedby, but never sets aria-invalid="false" (or removes the attribute). Screen readers may continue to treat the field as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false'); or removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid'); at the end of the markValid function.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button controls the navigation drawer panel, but no aria-controls attribute is set linking the trigger to the drawer element's ID. Users cannot predict what element will be expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure the drawer has an ID (e.g., _drawer.id = _drawer.id || 'mobile-nav-drawer';) then add setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id); during initialization.

issuesFound.title: Inline form validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid fields

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not update aria‑expanded on the trigger button

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close actions are not announced to screen readers

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu toggle does not update aria‑expanded on its button

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion panel open/close actions are not announced to screen readers

issuesFound.explanation: The period selection buttons (`_periodBtns`) are styled as a toggle group but never receive `aria‑pressed="true"`/`"false"` to convey the active state to AT.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion trigger does not update aria‑expanded when opened/closed
issuesFound.explanation: The `faqAccordion.toggle()` function shows/hides the answer panel but never updates the trigger button’s `aria-expanded` attribute, making the state invisible to screen readers.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion state change not announced

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing aria-controls

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu close function missing aria-expanded

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open function missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: Opening the mobile drawer adds CSS classes to show the panel and locks body scroll, but never sets aria-expanded="true" on the hamburger trigger button. Screen reader users cannot tell the navigation is now open.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation close function missing aria-expanded

issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); immediately after _open = false; in the close function.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open action not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding a FAQ panel reveals new content, but no aria-live announcement is made. Blind users may not realize that additional content has appeared below the button.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion close action not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: Collapsing a FAQ panel removes content from view, but no announcement is made. Users may be unaware that the content is now hidden.

issuesFound.title: Product filter results not announced to screen readers

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation missing focus return on close

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing aria‑controls attribute

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion trigger missing aria‑controls linking to its panel
issuesFound.explanation: When parsing FAQ items, the trigger button is not given an `aria-controls` attribute that references the associated answer panel, breaking the required relationship.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1685 (inside `faqRegistry.parse`): `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav focus trap not initialized
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav module declares a _trap variable for focus trapping but never initializes createFocusTrap in the init function. Keyboard focus can escape the mobile menu when open, violating focus containment requirements.
issuesFound.fix: Line: mobileNav.init(): _trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { escapeDeactivates: true });

issuesFound.title: productFilter count change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Updating the product count badge changes visible text but does not announce the new count to a live region. Users are not informed how many products match the filter.
issuesFound.fix: Line: productFilter._updateCountBadge(): liveRegion.announce(`${count} products found`);

issuesFound.title: cookieConsent banner appearance not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Showing the cookie consent banner does not announce its appearance to a live region. Screen reader users may not be aware the dialog has appeared.
issuesFound.fix: Line: cookieConsent._showBanner(): liveRegion.announceAssertive('Cookie consent options are now available');

issuesFound.title: testimonialsCarousel play/pause state not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Toggling the carousel auto-play state updates the button label but does not announce the change to a live region. Users are not informed if auto-rotation is active.
issuesFound.fix: Line: testimonialsCarousel.play(): liveRegion.announce('Automatic slide rotation started');

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator not setting aria-invalid on fields
issuesFound.explanation: When validation fails, the function does not set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field, and does not clear it to "false" when valid. This prevents screen readers from identifying invalid fields.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3300 (in _renderResult): Add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', String(!result.valid));`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu triggers missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menu triggers do not set aria-expanded to reflect the open or closed state of their associated panels. This prevents assistive technologies from announcing the state correctly.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1400 (in _openInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` Line 1410 (in _closeInstance): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav close not returning focus to trigger
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer closes, focus is not returned to the toggle button that opened it. Keyboard users lose their place in the tab order.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1250 (end of close function): Add `_trigger.focus();`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion triggers missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ accordion buttons do not update aria-expanded when expanding or collapsing answer panels. Screen readers cannot convey the expanded/collapsed state to users.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2800 (in open): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` Line 2820 (in close): Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied and the product count changes, the update is not announced to screen readers via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2400 (after _updateCountBadge): Add `liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} products found`);`

issuesFound.title: pricing setPeriod missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period changes, the price updates are not announced to screen readers, leaving users unaware of the change.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3100 (end of setPeriod): Add `liveRegion.announce(`Prices updated to ${period} billing`);`

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The search input element does not update its aria-expanded attribute when the suggestion list opens or closes. This prevents screen readers from announcing the visibility of the suggestions.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2200 (in _open): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` Line 2220 (in _close): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing FAQ items does not trigger a live region announcement, so screen reader users may not be aware the content has changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2800 (in open): Add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} expanded`);` Line 2820 (in close): Add `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} collapsed`);`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is not initialized with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads and the menu is closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1280 (after _initialised = true): Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown triggers are not initialized with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1450 (after setting aria-controls): Add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing aria-hidden when closed
issuesFound.explanation: When closed, the mobile navigation drawer remains in the accessibility tree without aria-hidden="true", allowing screen readers to access hidden content.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1250 (in close): Add `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true');` and in open (~line 1230): Add `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing dropdown menus does not announce the state change to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1400 (in _openInstance): Add `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');` Line 1410 (in _closeInstance): Add `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: Contact form validation does not set aria‑invalid
issuesFound.explanation: contactForm._onSubmit uses inlineValidator.validate to check fields, but inlineValidator only adds error messages and CSS classes; it never sets aria‑invalid on invalid inputs, violating WCAG 4.1.2.
issuesFound.fix: In inlineValidator.validate or after a failed validation, call field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true'); and clear it on success.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The function _openInstance in the dropdown menu controller adds the “open” class and removes the hidden attribute from the panel, but it never sets aria‑expanded on the trigger button. Screen‑reader users therefore cannot know whether the menu is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); inside _openInstance (and the corresponding setAttr(..., 'false') in _closeInstance).

issuesFound.title: Product filter does not announce count changes
issuesFound.explanation: _updateCountBadge updates the numeric badge but never announces the new total via a live region, so users of assistive technology are unaware when the number of visible products changes.
issuesFound.fix: After setting the badge text, call liveRegion.announce(`${count} product${count===1?'':'s'} found`); or update a dedicated aria‑live status element.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger does not update aria‑expanded on close
issuesFound.explanation: The _closeInstance function hides the panel and removes the “open” class, yet it never resets aria‑expanded to false on the trigger element, leaving the accessibility state stale.
issuesFound.fix: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); inside _closeInstance.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open/close not announced
issuesFound.explanation: open and close functions animate the panel but do not provide a live‑region announcement of the state change, leaving screen‑reader users without feedback.
issuesFound.fix: Add liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} – ${item.open?'expanded':'collapsed'}`); after toggling the panel.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown trigger is registered, the code sets aria‑haspopup but never defines an initial aria‑expanded value (should be false by default). Assistive technologies therefore cannot infer the collapsed state on page load.
issuesFound.fix: In register add setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); after setting aria‑haspopup.

issuesFound.title: Mobile‑nav toggle missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: mobileNav.init adds the click handler to the hamburger button but does not set an initial aria‑expanded="false" state, so assistive technologies cannot know the menu is collapsed on load.
issuesFound.fix: After obtaining _trigger, add setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false'); during initialization.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markInvalid function in srUtils links the error message via aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Assistive technology relies on aria-invalid to identify invalid inputs.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1380: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The open and close functions in the mobileNav module toggle the visibility of the navigation drawer but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button (_trigger). Screen reader users will not know the menu state has changed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1630: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 1655: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: pricing toggle switch does not update aria-checked
issuesFound.explanation: The _syncToggleState function in the pricing module updates the visual class of the toggle switch (_toggleEl) but does not update the aria-checked attribute. Screen readers will not announce the correct billing period state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2415: setAttr(_toggleEl, ARIA.CHECKED, isYear);

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance and _closeInstance functions in the dropdownMenu module show or hide the panel but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button (inst.trigger). This prevents assistive technology from announcing the dropdown state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1765: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 1785: setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markValid function in srUtils removes the error description but does not set aria-invalid="false" or remove the attribute from the field. The field may remain announced as invalid to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1390: field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'false');

issuesFound.title: pricing period change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The setPeriod function in the pricing module updates prices dynamically but does not announce the billing period change (e.g., "Prices switched to annual billing") to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2390: liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly);

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The open function in the faqAccordion module expands the answer panel but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button (item.trigger). The close function correctly sets it to false, creating an inconsistent state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2635: setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav state change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The toggle function in mobileNav changes the navigation state but does not announce the change (e.g., "Navigation menu opened") to screen readers via the liveRegion module. Users are unaware the menu state changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1625: liveRegion.announce(_open ? STRINGS.announce.navOpen : STRINGS.announce.navClosed);

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The init function in the mobileNav module sets up event listeners but does not initialize the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button (_trigger). It should start as "false" since the menu is closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1705: setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The register function in the dropdownMenu module sets aria-haspopup and aria-controls but does not initialize aria-expanded="false" on the trigger. This leaves the initial state undefined for assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1835: setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer visibility toggle does not manage aria-hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The open and close functions in mobileNav toggle CSS classes to show/hide the drawer (_drawer) but do not toggle aria-hidden. If CSS uses techniques other than display:none, the drawer may remain in the accessibility tree when hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1630: setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'false');
  Line 1655: setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true');

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu state change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The _onTriggerClick function in dropdownMenu opens or closes the menu but does not announce the action to screen readers. Users relying on AT will not know the dropdown state changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1755: liveRegion.announce(inst.open ? 'Menu closed' : 'Menu opened');

issuesFound.title: productFilter tab buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: Filter tab buttons do not use aria-pressed to indicate the active filter state. Screen readers cannot convey which filter is currently applied.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2500: Inside the forEach loop processing filter tabs, add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: contactForm validation missing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The contact form validation relies on inlineValidator which does not set aria-invalid. Invalid fields are not programmatically identified to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3500: After calling inlineValidator.validate for each field, add `if (!result.valid) setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true'); else setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: newsletterForm validation missing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The newsletter form validation does not set aria-invalid on the email field when validation fails.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3400: After the validation check `if (!result.valid)`, add `setAttr(_emailEl, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: multiStepWizard validation missing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The wizard step validation does not set aria-invalid on invalid fields within the step.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3600: After calling inlineValidator.validate for each field, add `if (!result.valid) setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: siteSearch init missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The search input is not initialized with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads with the suggestion list closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2250 (after _initialised = true): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open not activating focus trap
issuesFound.explanation: The function creates a focus trap but never activates it, allowing focus to escape the drawer when it is open.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1230 (in open): Add `if (_trap) _trap.activate();`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open/close missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing the mobile navigation does not announce the state change to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1230 (in open): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen);` Line 1250 (in close): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed);`

issuesFound.title: activeFilterChips render missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When filter chips are added or removed, the changes are not announced to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2600 (end of render): Add `liveRegion.announce(`Active filters: ${chips.length}`);`

issuesFound.title: Dropdown keyboard activation does not set aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: In _onTriggerKeydown, pressing Enter/Space opens the dropdown via _openInstance, but the function does not update aria‑expanded on the trigger, leaving the ARIA state out of sync with the visual state.
issuesFound.fix: After calling _ openInstance(inst), add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); (and similarly set to false on Escape).

issuesFound.title: siteSearch combobox does not update aria-expanded on input
issuesFound.explanation: The _open and _close functions in the siteSearch module control the suggestion list visibility but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the search input (_inputEl). This violates the combobox pattern requirements.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2155: setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');
  Line 2165: setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The init function in the siteSearch module configures the input with aria-haspopup but does not set the initial aria-expanded="false" attribute. The combobox state is incomplete on page load.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2235: setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion state change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The toggle function in faqAccordion expands or collapses FAQ items but does not announce the change (e.g., "Answer expanded") to screen readers. This degrades the experience for non-visual users.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2625: liveRegion.announce(item.open ? STRINGS.announce.faqClosed(item.question) : STRINGS.announce.faqOpened(item.question));

issuesFound.title: productFilter result count change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The applyFilters function in productFilter updates the visible product count but does not announce the new count (e.g., "Showing 5 products") to screen readers. Users are unaware the filter results updated.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2000: liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(s.activeCategory));
